positive: A sophisticated, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features stylized, oversized glowing bioluminescent flora and delicate, abstract moon-shaped trees. The main subject is a central grouping of intertwined glowing vines and crystalline leaves that form a symmetrical wreath. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette with contrasting pops of ethereal cyan and pale gold for the glowing elements. The style should be modern linework, clean silhouette art, highly detailed etching quality, rendered with strong, crisp contrasts and flat areas of solid color. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for large-format apparel printing, with clear separation between elements to prevent visual clutter. Include subtle geometric patterns within the negative space.
negative: artifacts, blur, text, logo, watermark, blurry, low resolution, signature, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, jpeg artifacts, muted colors
